items.claim: Conor McGregor has been out of competition for a long time.
items.quote: Conor McGregor has been out for so long.

items.claim: Conor McGregor suffered a severe injury in the Octagon.
items.quote: he has had one of the worst injuries we've ever seen in the Octagon.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has a history of well-publicized drug addiction.
items.quote: he is going through a well publicized drug addiction

items.claim: Fighters who go through significant personal turmoil outside the cage typically perform poorly upon their return.
items.quote: usually when fighters go through all of that type of stuff, when they return, they don't look that good.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is no longer capable of making mid-fight tactical adjustments.
items.quote: Conor's days of adapting midfight, I'm pretty sure are done.

items.claim: Max Holloway has a deeper technical arsenal now than he did in his first fight against Conor McGregor.
items.quote: these guys have a deeper arsenal than they once did especially Max Holay

items.claim: Conor McGregor's physical durability and cardio have declined since his prime.
items.quote: the biggest difference is definitely in the hardware... the durability will come in the cardio

items.claim: Conor McGregor is currently a plus 190 underdog against Max Holloway.
items.quote: the Andro price tag on Conor McGregor sitting at plus 190.

items.claim: Max Holloway is currently a minus 225 favorite against Conor McGregor.
items.quote: they have Max Holloway as the minus 225 favorite
